trans-d_mn_366: I have a lot of work to do today
trans-d_mn_488: I have a headache, I feel like I have a fever, I don't know
trans-d_mn_414: Hello, how are you? Hello, how are you
trans-d_mn_497: How are you? I heard you were sick. Did you get better
trans-d_mn_523: The price of the new car is high, I can't afford it
trans-d_mn_265: Are you going to the market or somewhere else
trans-d_mn_41: Do you have any apples or pears? I don't like oranges. Do you have any grapes
trans-d_mn_430: Good friend! How are you doing? Are you feeling well
trans-d_mn_394: What kind of food is there? Is there a restaurant near here? Are you hungry
